subcodes.first_line: We have made manifest the Cause and revealed the verses unto them that have cast aside vain imaginings and turned toward the Dawning-Place of certitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اظهرنا الامر و انزلنا الایات للذین نبذوا الاوهام و اقبلوا الی مشرق الیقین
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
